changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Store the physical LineString vertex count per gps_track_data row. This is intentionally variant-local: RAW, RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED, SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE and SIMPLIFIED_FIXED_POINTS each derive the value from their own geometry. The application sets the value before insert/update.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE gps_track_data ADD COLUMN number_of_physical_points integer
